{{ _("Date") }}: {{ doc.get_formatted("posting_date") }}
{{ _("Customer") }}: {{ doc.customer_name }}

{%- for item in doc.items -%} {%- endfor -%}
{{ _("Item") }} {{ _("Qty") }} {{ _("Amount") }}
{{ item.item_code }} {%- if item.item_name != item.item_code -%}

@ {{ item.get_formatted("rate") }}		 {{ item.get_formatted("amount") }}

{{ _("Total Excl. Tax") }} {{ doc.get_formatted("net_total", doc) }} {{ _("Total") }} {{ doc.get_formatted("total", doc) }}
{% if '%' in row.description %} {{ row.description }} {% else %} {{ row.description }}@{{ row.rate }}% {% endif %} {{ row.get_formatted("tax_amount", doc)}}
{{ _("Discount") }} {{ doc.get_formatted("discount_amount") }}
{{ _("Grand Total") }} {{ doc.get_formatted("grand_total") }}
{{ _("Rounded Total") }} {{ doc.get_formatted("rounded_total") }}
{{ _("Paid Amount") }} {{ doc.get_formatted("paid_amount") }}
{{ _("Change Amount") }} {{ doc.get_formatted("change_amount")}}

{{ doc.terms or "" }}

{{ _("Thank you, please visit again.") }}

html:
{% set letterhead = frappe.get_doc("Letter Head",'APC') %}
{{letterhead.content}}
{% set letterhead = frappe.get_doc("Letter Head",'APC') %}
{{letterhead.footer}}
AGREEMENT BY AND BETWEEN
{{doc.company}}
AND
{{doc.customer}}
{%if doc.customer_name_in_arabic%} ({{doc.customer_name_in_arabic}}){%endif%}
{%set comp=frappe.get_doc("Company",doc.company)%} {%if doc.customer_address%} {%set add=frappe.get_doc("Address",doc.customer_address)%} {%endif%} This Agreement is made and executed by and between {{doc.company}} C.R. {%if comp.custom_cr_number%}{{comp.custom_cr_number}}{%endif%} , {%if doc.customer_address %}{{add.address_line1}} {{add.address_line2}}, {{add.city}} {{add.country}} {%endif%} here in after referred to as the вҖңContractorвҖқ {{doc.customer}}
{%set cust=frappe.get_doc("Customer",doc.customer)%} ID NO : {%if cust.custom_cr_number%}{{cust.custom_cr_number}}{%endif%}, and contact number : {%if doc.contact_phone%}{{doc.contact_phone}}{%endif%} Referred to as the вҖңClintвҖқ

Whereas, Client desires to Supply and Apply application and Contractor agrees to finish the labor needed for the execution of that work under the terms and conditions set herein:

Article 1. Scope of Work
* Make repair for concrete work
* apply one coat of primer
* installation of two layers of POLYUREA

Article 2 Variations
Any variation of this Contract must be in writing and by mutual consent of both parties or it will
Hold no validity.

Article 3 Warranty
7.1 Warranty is set to 10 years from the day of application completion for the application work.

Article 4. Prices
4.1 The Client shall pay the Contractor a total sum of {{doc.total}} SR (Totl) Will add the 15% vat to the total amount to be {{doc.grand_total}} SR as the table below:
{%for i in doc.items%} {%endfor%}
SL No. PROJECT DESCRIPTION UNIT PRICE AREA (m2) TOTAL AMOUNT
{{i.idx}} {{i.description}} {{i.rate}} {{i.qty}} {{i.amount}}
Total amount without vat {{doc.total}}
Vat 15 % {{doc.total_taxes_and_charges}}
Total with vat {{doc.grand_total}}

Article 5. {%if doc.payment_terms_template %}{{doc.payment_terms_template}}{%endif%}
{%for i in doc.payment_schedule%}
{{i.description}}
{%endfor%}

Article 6 Miscellaneous
6.1 All permanent materials will be provided by clint
6.2 Accommodation and transportation will be provided by Contractor
6.3 Man lift provided by contractor
6.4 Electricity (220/30A/3ph) will be supplied by Client
6.5 Re-measurements will be affected jointly with Client. If Client fails to appear Contractor own Measurements will be valid.
6.7 The second party is obliged to free zone for the first party to display an identification board
6.9 Client should be provide Water grander disck , tower light ,preperation material ,chemical bond , primer and polyurea for the Work site.
7.0 first party should clean the site from his material and equipment and delevare to the clint as same as received

This present contract is the only valid document prescribing the rights and liabilities of each party and will prevail against any other document whatsoever.
Bank Details
We would like to note that the financial extracts are paid through the official company accounts listed at the bottom of the page or through a bank check, and no amounts that may be sent through any other accounts or in cash are considered.
{%if doc.terms %}{{doc.terms}}{%endif%}
Article 7 Jurisdiction
8.1 Saudi Courts will have jurisdiction on any legal issues In witness thereof

{{doc.company}}
{{doc.customer}}

JOB OFFER LETTER

We are pleased to offer you the opportunity of employment with {{ doc.company or "BCI Company (BCI)" }}. This offer is valid for five (5) days from the date of issuance. The specific details are as follows:

Employee Name {{ doc.applicant_name or "" }}

Medical Insurance {{ doc.medical_insurance or "Provided By Company as per policy" }}
Other Terms & Conditions Working Hours: 48 hours / 6 days per week & other terms follow Saudi Labor Law
Probation Period {{ doc.probation_period or "3 months (extendable as per Saudi Labor Law)" }}
Total Salary {{ doc.total_salary }} SAR

We would greatly appreciate your acceptance of this offer within its validity period and look forward to welcoming you to our team.

html:
{% if letter_head %} {{ letter_head }} {% endif %}
Subject: Official Warning Letter
Date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.deduction_start_date or frappe.utils.today(), "dd / MM / yyyy") }}
To: Employee / {{ doc.employee_name or "" }}
Job Title: {{ frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "designation") or "" }}
Department: {{ frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "department") or "" }}
Employee ID / Iqama No.: {{ doc.iqama_id or "" }}

Dear Sir/Madam,

This letter serves as formal notice to inform you that an official warning has been issued to you due to the violation stated below:

Type of violation / Reason for warning:
{{ doc.occurrence_no or "First" }} Occurrence
{{ doc.violation_type or "______________________________________________" }}
Date of violation:
{{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.deduction_start_date or frappe.utils.today(), "dd / MM / yyyy") }}

This warning is issued as a result of your failure to comply with the company's approved rules, regulations, and instructions, despite prior notice or the clear communication of company policies. Such behavior is considered a violation of internal work regulations.

Accordingly, you are required to strictly adhere to all company rules and regulations and to take immediate corrective action. Please be advised that any repetition of this violation may result in further disciplinary action, which could include salary deduction or termination of employment, in accordance with company policy and applicable labor laws.

This warning is issued to give you the opportunity to correct the situation and improve your performance and conduct.

{% if doc.remarks %}
Additional Notes:
{{ doc.remarks }}
{% endif %}

Should you wish to provide clarification or have any inquiries, please contact the Human Resources Department.

Yours sincerely,

Name:
Job Title: HR Manager
Signature:
Company Stamp
Employee Acknowledgment:

I hereby acknowledge receipt of this warning letter and confirm that I have read and understood its contents.

Employee Name:
Signature:
Date:
name: Official Warning Letter

Subject: Official Salary Deduction Notice
To: {{ doc.employee_name or "" }}
Job Title: {{ frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "designation") or "" }}
Department: {{ frappe.db.get_value("Employee", doc.employee, "department") or "" }}
ID / Iqama No.: {{ doc.iqama_id or "" }}

Dear Sir/Madam,

This letter serves as an official notification that a salary deduction has been applied to your monthly entitlements, as per the details below:

- Reason for deduction: {% if doc.reason_for_deduction in ["Violations вҖ“ Arabic", "Violations вҖ“ English"] %} Violation: {{ doc.violation_type or "______________________________" }} {% if doc.occurrence_no %} ({{ doc.occurrence_no }} Occurrence) {% endif %} {% else %} {{ doc.reason_for_deduction or "______________________________" }} {% endif %}
- Deduction amount: {{ frappe.utils.fmt_money(doc.monthly_deduction or 0, currency="SAR") }}
- Deduction date: {{ frappe.utils.formatdate(doc.deduction_start_date or frappe.utils.today(), "dd / MM / yyyy") }}
- Deduction method: {% set is_one_time = (doc.reason_for_deduction in ["Violations вҖ“ Arabic", "Violations вҖ“ English"]) or (doc.number_of_installments or 1) == 1 %} One-time deduction Scheduled deduction ({{ doc.number_of_installments or 1 }} installments)
Clarification:

According to the company's approved policies and regulations, employees are responsible for personal fees or obligations related to the above-mentioned matter unless otherwise stated in the employment contract or internal policies. Accordingly, this deduction has been applied to settle the outstanding amount.

Please note that this is purely administrative action and does not constitute any disciplinary measure unless the matter is repeated or associated with other violations.

Should you have any questions, please contact the Human Resources Department.

Yours sincerely,

Name:
Job Title: HR Manager
Signature:
Company Stamp
name: Official Salary Deduction Notice
